title: pimelea linifolia
intro: Pimelea linifolia, commonly known as silver bush or thread flower, is a small shrub native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pimelea linifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used by Indigenous Australians for centuries in traditional medicine.
